name: PACK THEIF (Pants)
description: Thief-style unboxing — sneaky character stealing pants from a box. Street fashion energy.
asset_requirements: Clear shot of the pants. Front required, back view optional.

input_manifest.label: Pants (Front)
input_manifest.hint: Front view of the pants. Flat lay or folded works well.

input_manifest.label: Pants (Back)
input_manifest.hint: Optional back view for more detail in the generated output.

steps.prompt: Streetwear thief aesthetic. Someone is pulling a pair of pants out of a shipping box dramatically. Urban street background, hooded figure, cinematic low-angle shot, the pants are the hero item shown prominently. Graffiti background, cinematic color grade, high fashion streetwear energy.

Streetwear thief video. A hooded character dramatically pulls the pants out of a box, holds them up to admire, turns them to show both sides. Urban street setting, cinematic camera move, streetwear fashion energy, the pants shown clearly throughout.
